item.title: Can you imagine…
item.description: Édit: thanks for most viral. I just thought it was important to share. I had friends who said racism no longer existed in the US just 5 years ago. We still have work to do. #nazis #racism_sucks
item.dc:creator: lurkerman45

item.title: PSA renting from Lyft
item.description: It's now been 56ish hours and still no help from Lyft. Mind you, this is a Lyft owned rental vehicle. I've had to stay with the car this entire time because I live 50 miles away from where I'm at, which btw is a no parking zone. This spot was the only place I could make it to. If you rent from Lyft, be careful. Edit: They sent AAA just now to jump start the vehicle eventhough I informed them that you cant do that if the HEV battery pack is below a certain voltage. The AAA tech was really nice, but unsuccessful due to what I learned about this system. So now I'm back on hold with roadside "assistance". Edit: I'm 50 miles from my house, and I know Lyft will charge me for when this car gets towed by the city of Chicago. Edit: Contacted "support" again and was told "Hope you're doing ok and having a great day. Please note that you need to complete 10 rides today to keep your account active." Update: look at PSA renting from Lyft pt.2 Update: pt.4 is conclusion
item.dc:creator: Thanksforl

item.title: This is SO cool!
item.description: Follow our Instagram @amhband
item.dc:creator: amhband

item.title: PSA renting from Lyft pt. 2
item.description: The continuation of part 1. Update: paid for a tow truck, got to the lyft facility, was told they don't have another rental car available. I told them all it needed was a charge to the HEV battery and it would be good to go. Instead, they told me I needed to pay $1000 and change to be able to rent again. Furthermore I have to find my own way home. I can't cash out my earnings from the Lyft app because I apparently owe them a grand. So now I'm just stuck out front of the place with no way to get the 50 miles back home. Fucking priceless. Update: Check out pt. 3 Update: pt.4 is conclusion
item.dc:creator: Thanksforl

item.title: The Most Super Heroes Of All
item.description: There are several amazing superheroes in other cities and states volunteering their time to such an awesome service to brave girls & boys. I sincerely thank you for giving light and hope in an often dark and scary world. #superhero #superman #batman #captain_america #kids #childrenshospital #cool #nostalgia #mildly_interesting #mildly_amusing

item.title: I needed to create some space
item.description:
I never got a fucking cake...
My partners name is Mike.
Mine once stopped a whole meeting, made me mute and everything... "why do we have so many pillows on the bed it's annoying"
Shooomp..... pop.
This one gets some mileage
My dog Diablo has become "de blubbo" over the years
AAAAAAAAAAA
Avoid if you tend to clench when anxious
"Plz help my son... he... he's a Goth..."
AAAAAAAAAAAAA
Huehuehue
Pet tax... the day I figured out how the cat gets so damp.
item.dc:creator: Allergictocats

item.title: Curb find of the day
item.description:
Saw this bad boy, thought I could sell it for a little bit. Right down the road from my storage unit, so I was just gonna run it over there.
Tight fit, but I got it in the van.
Fuck. The seat busted through the shitty particle board back. Oh well, I’ll get it out later.
Tadaa!
item.dc:creator: steeltoesandal
